text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's time for summer camp, a valuable opportunity
for Umamusume to improve their skills and
develop. Nishino Flower appears impatient to get
started...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Let's make the most of this camp, Trainer!
choice_data_list: I'm with you all the way!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Right!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I may have had a disappointing showing in the
Japanese Oaks, but...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I just know I can live up to everyone's
expectations in the Sprinters Stakes!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nishino Flower's enthusiasm is palpable. And the
thing is, I'm just as motivated.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She should be entering a period of rapid
development soon, when her body begins
transforming gradually from one of a child into
one of an adult.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Once her physical attributes blossom, she'll finally
be able to race at peak potential. I'll have to
keep searching for the optimal way to train her...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
When you're with me, I feel like... I can keep
pushing myself to work harder.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She does her best for my sake, so now it's my turn
to guide her along the path to a successful future.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Phew, what sweltering passion.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
You two look so serious even though camp hasn't
even started yet.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Oh, hi Sky.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Can't you hear it, Flower? The sea breeze calling
our names?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: It's telling us to take a nap on the beach!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
A nap outdoors?! You could get heatstroke if
you're not careful!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Um, there's still time before we start, right?!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I will! Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Wait up, Sky! I'll bring you a cold drink and a
towel to lie on!
choice_data_list: (I wonder if this will help her loosen up a little.)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I silently thank Seiun Sky for her subtle display of
kindness. And with that, our fiery summer camp
begins!
